# Daily Report — 2026-06-14

## Task Completed
Added `list_change_approvals` tool that queries the `sysapproval_approver` table scoped to
`source_table=change_request`. Supports filtering by change request (CHG number or sys_id —
automatically resolved via a lookup when a number is given), approval state
(requested/approved/rejected/not_yet_requested/cancelled), and approver user name.
Returns paginated results with `has_more`/`next_offset` keys. Reference fields
(`document_id`, `approver`) are normalised to display values. Registered in
`change_coordinator` and `full` packages.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1623
- New tests: 18
- All passing: yes

## Security
Pre-existing system-level findings only (setuptools, urllib3, wheel) — none introduced by
this change.

## Files Changed
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/change_tools.py` — added imports, `ListChangeApprovalsParams`,
  `_format_approval`, `_resolve_change_sys_id`, `list_change_approvals`
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/__init__.py` — export `list_change_approvals`
- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` — import and register `list_change_approvals`
- `config/tool_packages.yaml` — added to `change_coordinator` and `full`
- `tests/test_change_approvals.py` — 18 new tests
